headline: Bank of America Lifts Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Target, Sees Upside from Agentic AI Shift
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE:HPE) is included among the 10 Innovative Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 27, Bank of America raised its price recommendation on Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE:HPE) to $38 from $32. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. headline: Seagate Is Sold Out Through 2027 As AI Reshapes Hard Drive Demand
summary: Seagate (NASDAQ: STX) is sold out. Management confirmed that nearline capacity is almost fully allocated through calendar 2027, a level of forward visibility that is rare for a hardware company. AI infrastructure buildout has consumed supply faster than the industry can respond, and Seagate's Mozaic HAMR (Heat-Assisted Magnetic Recording) technology is the primary reason hyperscalers are locking in multi-year contracts.
